steps.title: Use the temporary-label idea
steps.content: The researchers argue that invasive and native describe temporary circumstances. Because climate change may shift ranges and create new suitable habitats, current species labels may need to be reconsidered.

steps.title: Avoid overclaiming
steps.content: Choice A predicts a specific future status outside Namibia that the text does not support. Choice B invents past competition in Namibia. Choice C says Namibia should relabel the house sparrow now, which goes beyond the argument. The answer is D.
